pi_items.source: Parsed SampleDivesV2.ssrf which contains <divecomputerid model='Heinrichs Weikamp OSTC 3'>
Derived explicitly from task.json description requirements
Confirmed by setup_task.sh which copies the sample data to this path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from SampleDivesV2.ssrf, which was verified to contain a dive computer model 'Heinrichs Weikamp OSTC 3' (matching the target 'ostc 3'). The expected output file path is confirmed to be '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf' based on setup scripts, and the target nickname 'My Primary OSTC' is explicitly defined in the task instructions.
